programme.title: Eeshwar
programme.desc: Ishwar is a simple-minded and honest young man, devout and religious, he cares for everybody. He meets with a young widow with a son and marries her. This story is about him and his triumphs.

programme.title: Comedy Station - Bittu Bak Bak
programme.desc: Series of short, comedic vignettes where an unlucky Bhojpuri producer Champaklal and his secretary Suzie hilariously navigate chaotic, low-budget filmmaking, trying to outsmart each other.

programme.title: E249 - Sandy's Nutty Nieces / Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's 3 nieces. // SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: E906 - Rough Patch / The GLOAT
programme.desc: To earn her next patch and become a golden Snickerdoodle, Lola must spend quality time with Sunset Canyon senior, Bernie. // After Lynn sees cousin Shiloh's athletic skills, she gets overly competitive to prove she's the greatest Loud of all time.

programme.title: E300 - PL-1413 / In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: E513 - Secret Room
programme.desc: Captain Man reveals a 'Crimefighters Only' room in the Man Cave. Jealous, Charlotte, Jasper and Schwoz make a cooler room to show them up. As the gang fights over who gets the better room, things get blown out of proportion.

programme.title: E205 - iStage An Intervention
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he’s being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: E205 - Movie Stars / Dr. Smart Science
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob work at the movie theater to watch a new premiere. // With Sandy's guidance, Patrick hosts a science show.

programme.title: E305 - Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper’s enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes. So when he is falsely accused of a burglary and sent to jail, Henry and Ray must find a way to set him free.

programme.title: E707 - Road Trip: Doll Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Realizing Mr. Coconuts is missing, Luan rallies the Louds to track him down along Route 66.

programme.title: E240 - Bubbletown / Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown... Bubbletown! // Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: E1008 - My Phony Valentine / Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals. // When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E203 - I Know What You Did This Summer
programme.desc: Max learns that Phoebe is working with Captain Perfect, and sets out to uncover the secret he is keeping. Chloe's crush invites her to a product launch party at Splat By The Sea, at the same time Jinx and Booch want her to protest outside the party.

programme.title: E1008 - My Phony Valentine / Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals. // When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E250 - Broken Alarm / Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time. // Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: E121 - The Patrick Show Sells Out
programme.desc: The Patrick Show gets competing sponsors.

programme.title: E107
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: An artist wields 3D printing technology to create art that will be exhibited on the moon. A museum promotes inclusivity by 3D printing replicas of artefacts for visually-impaired guests.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: E427
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E224
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E422 - Talk With World Leaders (III)
programme.desc: TALK WITH WORLD LEADERS: Talk With World Leaders reveals compelling insights into key international figures in the fields of politics, industry, business, science and the arts, giving Chinese audiences a closer look at the world leaders.

E164
programme.desc: A judge sounds off on a mother charged with assaulting her own daughter; a man convicted of robbery becomes physically ill after downing a mystery drink; and more.

programme.title: E165
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A handcuffed defendant attempts a bold escape from the courtroom; a judge gets cursed at when an arraignment goes off the rails; and more.

programme.title: E1 - Tim (Part A)
programme.desc: Tim suffers from feelings of abandonment and hoarding cars and parts is how he copes. Shortly after Tim and DeeDee married, they lost their home in a fire. After moving to a new home, Tim's hoarding began.

programme.title: E2 - Tim (Part B)
programme.desc: Once they moved into their new home, Tim's hoarding began and continued for years. Now, DeeDee refuses to return home to the mess, and they face the possibility of divorce if he doesn't clean up his hoard.

programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. programme.desc: The latest multi-platform showbiz news and talk show on Kapuso network.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Task Force Firewall
programme.desc: It centers on a specialized team against cybercrime.

programme.title: Fast Talk With Boy Abunda

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!

Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some big outdoor adventures with Baby John! First, Dad makes sure the family is prepared with the proper clothes, first aid & food. Then, the family enters a sandcastle competition, where Baby John, Jack & Jill work together to build a giant sand turtle! The fun continues as the family goes camping, but nighttime is a little scary! Mom & Dad show the kids there's nothing to be afraid of, especially with the beautiful stars to look at!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are turning little problems into big adventures! When Mr. Vanderboos accidentally sprays hair growth serum on Daddy, Officer Freeze mistakes him for a hairy monster, & a wild chase begins! Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.desc: In Espelette, Alessandra Montagne meets Benjamin, a local cook and lover of Basque products. Together, they revisit a traditional dish: taloa.

programme.title: E113
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E3 - Paris Philharmonia/Vincent Garnier Pressiat
programme.desc: The Paris Philharmonia is home to a museum dedicated to music. Vincent Garnier Pressiat's audacious fashion style permeates the French capital.

programme.title: E2 - The Shepherd And His Lights
programme.desc: Francois Duruz, a former city dweller turned shepherd and watercolorist, finds in solitude, nature and light a profound balance. He has transformed his mountain refuge into an ephemeral gallery where landscapes, colors and emotions become one.

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: NASA has been remarkably successful at sending robots to Mars' surface. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at the varied and ingenious methods used to land spacecraft on the red planet, starting with Pathfinder in 1997.

programme.title: Gaming Show Olympics
programme.desc: The gang decides to host their very own Video Game Olympics. Only the best will make it through all the video game events to win the medal.

programme.title: Old Math is New Again
programme.desc: In this episode we travel to ancient Egypt to explore an age-old multiplication method. How is this ancient method of multiplication, using ‘times two', similar to that used by modern computers? Eric will find out by conducting a range of fun experiments.

programme.title: Fish in Muddy Burrows
programme.desc: Mudskipper fish live on land in muddy burrows. They come out at low tide to look for small plants and animal matter to eat. They can hold water in their gills and by keeping their skin moist they can breathe through it like amphibians do.

programme.title: Trip to India
programme.desc: For hamsters' day, Zoe and Milo want to surprise Alim by making confetti to throw on their little friend. But Alim knows a place on earth where people celebrate by throwing something more interesting than confetti up in the air. Our heroes land in Rajasthan, India.

programme.title: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: When a message in a bottle washes up on shore, Darwin and Newts must use their knot knowledge to follow the trail to some pirate treasure.

programme.title: Conductivity
programme.desc: An accident rescuing a piece of toast from the toaster leads Smorph to find out how some materials conduct electricity and some do not.

programme.title: Earth Day
programme.desc: Let's celebrate this wonderful planet we call home! Make sure to remember our 3 Rs!

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Fascinating Fossils
programme.desc: Were all dinosaurs reptiles? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of palaeontology. Have hands-on fun by creating a dinosaur egg, and get to know Teuku Jacob, who used fossils and remains to study the origins and predecessors of present human species.

programme.title: Dog
programme.desc: Boom should guess what Reds draw on the floor.

programme.title: The Odor
programme.desc: Something's wrong-and smelly-in town. It's Flippy, who hasn't showered in three weeks because of his new pets... lice! When the others find out, they'll do whatever it takes to clean him up. Everyone except Jessi, who sides with Flippy-he's named every single louse!

programme.title: Good Whale Hunting
programme.desc: Desperate for funding, the gang goes to an upscale charity event to meet some potential investors. Nobody takes the kids seriously until a live stream goes wrong, and they have an opportunity to demonstrate their anti-troll invention in real-time.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team
programme.desc: When one of their friends gets hurt, Darwin and Newts form the Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team to help in an emergency.

programme.title: How Do Satellites Help Us Navigate?
programme.desc: Early pioneers explored the world using mathematics to navigate by the sun and the stars. By measuring their relation to key points on Earth, they could travel great distances. But how did mathematics help us make the jump into the age of satellite navigation?

programme.title: Crazy Catalysts
programme.desc: What is a catalyst? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemical engineering. Have hands-on fun by producing your own cheese, and get to know Ryong Ryoo, who discovered a rock trapping water inside it can serve as catalyst in petrochemicals.

programme.title: Shake a Tail Feather
programme.desc: Gabi can't decide which animal impression to do for the annual talent show. Anabella suggests she dance like a ‘Bird of Paradise' and Gabi is intrigued. Why would a bird dance? To find out and get a video of the rarely-seen dance, the team flies to New Guinea.

programme.title: Bianca Ciocirlan: Hoverboard Performer
programme.desc: Young hoverboard artist Bianca Ciocirlan shares how she became the best in the world, achieving forty-five pirouettes on a hoverboard in thirty seconds. Bianca is also a professional hoverboard performer and former figure skater.

programme.title: Tomorrow on TV
programme.desc: New multimedia cameras that introduce new ways to experience live events have been developed at Hasselt University. Through an innovative circular camera system, live streaming of 360 degree videos is now possible.

programme.title: Superhero Spinners
programme.desc: Alexia and Kloe are off to London to meet Dr. Xand and the Operation Ouch team to see if a scientist can figure out why they don't get dizzy when they spin. Izzy has a very important speed trial to see if she has what it takes to join the Olympic squad.

programme.title: Tartaruga
programme.desc: The Nektons explore a floating island and find the pieces of the ancient Lemurian navigation device. But why is this island moving?

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: What Does Space Sound Like?
programme.desc: Sound waves require a medium to travel through. Since space is a big empty void, there can't be sound waves in space. But there are other types of waves that can travel through a vacuum.

programme.title: Superhero Spinners
programme.desc: Alexia and Kloe are off to London to meet Dr. Xand and the Operation Ouch team to see if a scientist can figure out why they don't get dizzy when they spin. Izzy has a very important speed trial to see if she has what it takes to join the Olympic squad.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team
programme.desc: When one of their friends gets hurt, Darwin and Newts form the Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team to help in an emergency.

programme.title: How Do Satellites Help Us Navigate?
programme.desc: Early pioneers explored the world using mathematics to navigate by the sun and the stars. By measuring their relation to key points on Earth, they could travel great distances. But how did mathematics help us make the jump into the age of satellite navigation?

programme.title: Fascinating Fossils
programme.desc: Were all dinosaurs reptiles? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of palaeontology. Have hands-on fun by creating a dinosaur egg, and get to know Teuku Jacob, who used fossils and remains to study the origins and predecessors of present human species.

programme.title: Earth Day
programme.desc: Let's celebrate this wonderful planet we call home! Make sure to remember our 3 Rs!

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: The Odor
programme.desc: Something's wrong-and smelly-in town. It's Flippy, who hasn't showered in three weeks because of his new pets... lice! When the others find out, they'll do whatever it takes to clean him up. Everyone except Jessi, who sides with Flippy-he's named every single louse!

programme.title: Tartaruga
programme.desc: The Nektons explore a floating island and find the pieces of the ancient Lemurian navigation device. But why is this island moving?

programme.title: Crazy Catalysts
programme.desc: What is a catalyst? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemical engineering. Have hands-on fun by producing your own cheese, and get to know Ryong Ryoo, who discovered a rock trapping water inside it can serve as catalyst in petrochemicals.

programme.title: E1 - Green Guiana
programme.desc: We head to the heart of French Guiana, a territory where 97% of the land is covered by Amazonian forest. Antoine Auriol meets Philippe Lova Jah, Elvis, Mariana, Anais, Dave and Francisco, working to protect this natural treasure, and discovers the Kaw marshlands, veritable refuge for biodiversity.

E11
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E113 - King
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, Dipsy is King. Tinky Winky delivers Tubby Custard and Tubby Toast to King Dipsy - whatever King Dipsy wants! Luckily for Tinky Winky they soon swap places.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E18 - The Doctor
programme.desc: Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo's as the other injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle!

programme.title: E8 - Pockets
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: E45 - The Singing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out on a walk in the countryside. Its been a long walk and the squirrels are starting to get tired, but it's a long way back. Don't worry, Duggee has his singing badge.

programme.title: E43 - The Looking After Badge
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: E4 - The Continent Of Africa
programme.desc: Glitch takes Tala to the continent of Africa to help her with an Academy project.

programme.title: E5 - Pumpkin
programme.desc: Stanley must keep Myrtle's pumpkin safe from Speedy the snail. He builds a series of obstacles and defences to protect it from the tenacious Speedy who tests Stanley's ingenuity.

programme.title: E15 - I Can Make A Dolphin Noise
programme.desc: Back stroke and doggy paddle, flips, and roly-polys. The animals talk about all the fun stuff when swimming.

programme.title: E25 - It's Time To Build A Den
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran see Cynthia building a new greenhouse and decide to build a den. But when the den is too small both of them to fit in, Gran Gran helps JoJo to build a bigger den.

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E20 - The Crazy Golf Badge
programme.desc: It's crazy golf time and the everyone has to make their own courses.

programme.title: E14 - Spinach
programme.desc: It's the exceptional painter, Spinach, creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.title: E13 - Chicory
programme.desc: It's Chicory singing about how she was discovered in the song 'Chicory, Dickory, Dock!'

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: This time, Jamie shows us a roast dinner cooked all together in one pot, cutting down on washing up but never on flavour; and his store-cupboard version of a speedy carbonara that can use up whatever veg you have to hand. He shares two ways to use pre-packed ingredients to make crowd-pleasing starters or sides, and two stars of Middle Eastern cuisine show how store-cupboard spices can transform everyday ingredients into truly mouth-watering meals.

programme.desc: Touring Yellowstone, Ben uncovers a plot by the fast and furious LaGrange to find treasure buried below the national park. But with Old Faithful's help, Overflow is able to douse LaGrange's dreams.

programme.title: E18 - Brief Career Of Lucky Girl
programme.desc: When a wizard cosplayer gets his hands on a real, magical wand at Comic Con, Ben enlists Gwen to help stop Hex from retrieving it.

programme.title: E19 - Waterfilter
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max's trip to Niagara Falls is cut short by the horrid Hydromanders - creatures menacing them and their fellow tourists.

programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E104 - The Trouble Of The Toppled Trees
programme.desc: Sam and Kit try to uncover who has been chewing down the forest trees.

programme.title: E716 - The Outback
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig go to visit the Kangaroo family in Australia and get to explore The Outback.

programme.desc: Ryder and the Pups need to help get a surprise birthday ice cream cake up to Jake's cabin. // Alex and Daring Danny X are snowboarding right for Risky Ridge and need help from the PAW Patrol.

programme.title: E817 - Pups Save A Box Fort
programme.desc: The Pups must save Rocky and Humdinger from a runaway box fort.

programme.desc: Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to see a fish pond he used to visit when he was a little piggy. He is a little surprised to learn that a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: E621 - Pirate Treasure
programme.desc: Pirate Peppa and friends put together a chest of treasure and bury it in a marked spot. Soon Pedro needs to follow the trail as he realises he has lost something.

programme.title: E417 - Royal Rescue
programme.desc: A visit to the King's castle goes awry when the King accidentally catapults himself far, far away! To bring him home, Blaze, AJ and the King's adorable pet dragon Zeek must transform into knights in shining armor!

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.desc: Gabby, Blaze and AJ are out in the wilderness when they get a call, Blaze's friends have come down with a sickness called the Sneezles! Our heroes must race back to Axle City to bring the sick trucks the medicine oil they need.

programme.title: E409 - Winter Is Coming / Kite Fright

programme.title: E4 - Tastes Like Chicken

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

E1 - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E10 - Magic Show Mayhem
programme.desc: Billy and Bea come to the rescue of a magician whose retirement home presentation has gone awry. Then Billy helps a maple syrup-maker by removing a stinky pest from his sugar shack.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1 - Murchison GeoRegion
programme.desc: Western Australia’s Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its’ ancient landscapes and brilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back to the earth’s beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: E2 - Kamilaroi Highway (Part 1)
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in New South Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificent landscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way through a region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: E7 - Japan
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan’s bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan’s nightlife. Before they head out from their Japanese adventures, Rooftop and Catfish finish the trip learning how to drift and even attempt jumping into their drifting car. After such an action packed visit to Japan, where will the duo’s travels take them next?

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: E7 - Japan
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan’s bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan’s nightlife. Before they head out from their Japanese adventures, Rooftop and Catfish finish the trip learning how to drift and even attempt jumping into their drifting car. After such an action packed visit to Japan, where will the duo’s travels take them next?

programme.title: E10 - Magic Show Mayhem
programme.desc: Billy and Bea come to the rescue of a magician whose retirement home presentation has gone awry. Then Billy helps a maple syrup-maker by removing a stinky pest from his sugar shack.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips S1E1 -Murchison GeoRegion
programme.desc: Western Australia’s Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its’ ancient landscapes and brilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back to the earth’s beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips S1E2 -Kamilaroi Highway (Part 1)
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in New South Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificent landscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way through a region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: E2 - Part 2
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: E17 - Married...With Queen
programme.desc: In this two-part story, Peggy and Al attend the Polk High School Reunion where Peggy is determined to defeat her old nemesis for the title of Reunion Queen.

programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: E1 - A Capuchin’s Tale
programme.desc: Growing up in the rainforests in the heart of Colombia, a young capuchin monkey has to master his climbing skills, learn how to find food and learn to distinguish friend from foe.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E2 - Zambia's Peaceful Primates
programme.desc: Kasanka National Park in Zambia is home to an unusual species of baboon. Kinda baboons have turned their backs on the aggressive displays of dominance usually associated with these large monkeys and lead altogether more peaceful lives. Living alongside one troop is a dedicated team of researchers whose mission it is to uncover these baboons’ secrets and understand what makes them who they are.

programme.title: E1170

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: 一個小男孩向聖誕老人寄出願望清單時拼錯了關鍵字, 招來了一個惡魔般的角色, 讓佳節陷入混亂。

programme.title: Millers In Marriage
programme.desc: Three siblings navigate life's next chapter in this heartfelt drama about love and second chances.

programme.title: Millers In Marriage
programme.desc: Three siblings navigate life's next chapter in this heartfelt drama about love and second chances.

programme.title: Turning Point 2
programme.desc: To undertake the ending of TV drama “Lives of Omission”, Laughing is sentenced to life-imprisonment for killing Michael. In the prison, Laughing got to know Professor Fok, an introvert serving his sentence for drug-dealing. Professor Fok is a gifted psychologist who reads mind: discovering the deepest, darkest secrets of others, thus enabling him to manipulate and control others. Laughing learns more of psychology and he holds a strong admiration for Professor Fok. But in fact, Professor Fok has an ulterior motive. Laughing, confirming his imprisonment is all part of a new secret mission, the Security Bureau wants Laughing to infiltrate in prison to investigate further for the suspected corrupted cops...

programme.title: In Search of Lost Time
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, Du Siheng was sent to Shanghai Orphanage by her mother, who couldn't support two kids. Later, she was transferred to Inner Mongolia and adopted by a loving family. Sixty years later, Du Sihan set out for Inner Mongolia and embarked on a journey to find his elder sister. The journey, however, turned out to be full of twists and turns...... Du Siheng couldn't adapt to the life on the grassland when she first arrived in Inner Mongolia. Touched by the love and warmth from the Mongolia people, the young Du Siheng gradually integrated into her new family. After six decades, the sister and brother reunited again and finally let go of the past. They reminisced the days when their fathers fought for the land beneath their feet and drew motivation from the older generation to work hard for a more promising and prosperous future.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In a time of darkness and in the face of evil, one man dared to fight back. Utilising his combat skills as an assassin, a warrior defies an empire to become a legend and unite a nation.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E5 - 學霸如何高情商應答
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: Second Hand Husband
programme.desc: Gurpreet and Rajbir want to marry each other but Rajbir's compulsion to pay alimony to his ex-wife Neha seems a hurdle. To get rid of this constraint, they must convince Neha to marry someone.

programme.title: Fist Power
programme.desc: Retired veteran CHAU and his six-year-old son DONG DONG play cheerfully at a park. Suddenly, a couple shows up with their bodyguards. The woman has stayed with CHAU while pregnant, but later left him for a rich tycoon CHIU. Today, they come to get their son. Helplessly, CHAU watches them take away the crying child. He swears to bring him back. CHEUK is captain of a mainland security team. One day, CHEUK picks up his nephew after school as usual. Yet, the school is surrounded by the police. In fact, CHAU has taken students' hostage demanding to see his son. Or, he will bomb the school...

programme.title: Four Loves
programme.desc: The Cheng sisters, Li-fang and Li-chiung, leave war-torn Shanghai for Hong Kong. Li-chiung is rescued from robbers by Chien Pei-ling who decides to try out her luck in Hong Kong with the Chengs. They join Uncle and Aunt in Hong Kong. And they get along wonderfully with the daughter Cheng Hsiao-chuan. Li-chiung falls in love with Tony and elopes. That casts the first shadows on the friendships. It's Li-fang's turn to fall in love but both times Pei-ling steals her men. Hsiao-chuan meets Robert. A distraught Li-fang takes out a tutoring job in Macao where she falls in love. Pei-ling loves the same man...
